titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 1, no. 75: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 75. (A.R. No. 574 of 1971.) TAÑJĀVŪR, TANJAVUR TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stray stones collected and kept in the south-east verandah of the first prākāra in the Brihadīśvara temple.

p.hi: Parakēsarivarman, who took the head of Vīrapāṇḍya (Āditya II) Year 4: 964 A.D.

summary.p: Seems to record the investigation (ārāchchi) of the affairs of the Taḷikkuḷa-dēvar temple by Parāntaka Mūvēndavēḷār. In the course of this investigation it appears to have been found that 12 kāśu endowed by Pichchaṉ Vikramābharaṇi, a servant (peṇḍāṭṭi) residing at Ponnamaraiyar-aṅgaḍi for a perpetual lamp during the 11th regnal year of Rājakēsarivarmaṉ (Sundarachōḷa) still remained unallotted for earning interest to maintain the lamp. This amount was now entrusted to Nāgarāśaṉ Tiruvaḍigaḷ of the same aṅgaḍi after obtaining a hand receipt.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pāṇṭiyaṉ talaikoṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu parāntaka muventave
ḷāṉārācci taḷikkuḷatevarkku poṉṉamaraiyar Aṅkāṭi Irukkum poṇṭāṭṭi piccaṉ vikkiramāparaṇi
kovirācakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu vaitta nontā viḷakku Oṉṟiṉuḷ poṉṉamaraiyaraṅkāṭi
nākarācaṉ tiruvaṭikaḷ kaiyyeḻuttolai Iṭṭu koṇṭa kācu 10 2 .
Digital edition of SII 32, part 1, no. 75 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
